task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/parachute_spec.txt.

task_completion.description: Configure the 4 required ArduPilot parachute parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen showing the parameters CHUTE_ENABLED set to 1, CHUTE_TYPE set to 10, SERVO9_FUNCTION set to 27, and CHUTE_ALT_MIN set to 25.

task_completion.description: Create a Takeoff mission item to 80 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Takeoff' item in the mission list with the altitude explicitly set to 80m.

task_completion.description: Create a Waypoint at the Drop Zone coordinates at 80 meters altitude
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a 'Waypoint' item in the mission list with Latitude -35.3615, Longitude 149.1650, and Altitude 80m.

task_completion.description: Add a parachute release command to the mission
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a parachute release command (e.g., DO_PARACHUTE, Parachute, or similar vehicle command) added to the mission list.

task_completion.description: Save the completed flight plan to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog in QGroundControl or a file manager showing the file 'parachute_test.plan' saved in the /home/ga/Documents/QGC/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission and configure parameters
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl application interface being actively used (Plan view, Vehicle Setup), rather than a text editor manually writing a .plan JSON file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the map and mission list to build the flight plan
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of clicking on the map to add waypoints or using the mission item list on the right side of the QGroundControl Plan view.

integrity.description: Agent used the parameter editor to change values
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl parameter search and edit dialogs should be visible, proving the agent didn't just mock a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required parameters to verify in QGroundControl: CHUTE_ENABLED=1, CHUTE_TYPE=10, SERVO9_FUNCTION=27, CHUTE_ALT_MIN=25. Mission requirements: Takeoff altitude is exactly 80m. Waypoint coordinates are exactly Latitude -35.3615, Longitude 149.1650, with an altitude of 80m. The final plan must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/parachute_test.plan.
